name: bae4u-load-tests
description: Production-grade k6 load tests for Bae4U/Fantasy Bae

scripts.test:all: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:login-burst && npm run test:leaderboard
scripts.test:critical: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:discover
scripts.test:stress: npm run test:spike && npm run test:login-burst
scripts.test:production: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:discover && npm run test:cards && npm run test:leaderboard
scripts.test:full: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:login-burst && npm run test:leaderboard && npm run test:discover && npm run test:cards && npm run test:tournament && npm run test:tx-data
scripts.report:all: npm run report:smoke && npm run report:mobile && npm run report:login-burst && npm run report:leaderboard

author: Bae4U Performance Team
